final:
module top_module(
    input [3:0] data_in,
    input reset,
    output reg [3:0] data_out
    );always @ (data_in or reset) begin
        if (reset == 1) begin
            data_out <= 0;
        end
        else begin
            data_out <= ~data_in + 1;
        end
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      data_out <= data_in; // This statement should never be executed
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: data_out <= data_in; // This statement should never be executed
